production.playableLoop: Steer a hover-sled through a lunar canyon, collect four glowing energy cells, avoid drifting meteor hazards, and dock at the relay dish before the timer expires.
production.objective: Collect all four energy cells and reach the relay dish without hitting meteors.
production.progression: Meteors drift faster after two cells are collected.
production.failRetry: A meteor hit or expired timer switches to failed state; Space resets sled, cells, timer, and HUD.
feedbackMoments: HUD cell count increments on collection.
Energy cells and sled reactor bob continuously.
Meteors move on visible crossing paths.

assetPlan.playerHero: Custom procedural hover-sled built from hull, skid fins, cockpit, reactor, and runners.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Custom meteor hazards with dark rock silhouettes and moving hazard paths.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Custom energy cells with cyan cores and bobbing motion.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Custom lunar canyon with regolith floor, canyon walls, antenna relay, gantries, crates, lights, and planet backdrop.
assetPlan.uiHud: Structured HUD text plus retained loading, pause, settings, fail-retry, win-milestone, and touch-controls states.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Starter goal-ping asset retained for future collect/win hooks; current proof uses visual and HUD feedback.

assetSourcing: tn asset source search --game-category vehicle --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category collectible --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category arcade --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category racing --format glb --direct-only --json returned CC0 Kenney racing track/truck records, but they do not fit a lunar hover-sled canyon kit.

tn asset source search --game-category space --format glb --direct-only --json returned CC-BY Objaverse robots, ships, probes, and planets, but not a cohesive low-poly lunar canyon kit with matching collectibles and hazards.
Fallback: cohesive procedural/custom primitive mesh kit authored in content source.

ownsState: Transform positions for sled parts, cells, and meteors

proofCommands: tn game qa --project . --run-proof --url <preview-url> --entity player --press KeyD --expect-axis x --json
